title: Rethinking Talent and AI in HR: Insights from SRIF HR Summit 2026

title: Data Centers: Cyber Warfare's New Battleground
description: Iran's use of drones to attack Amazon Web Services data centers in the UAE and Bahrain marks the first instance of a nation targeting commercial data centers during wartime. These strikes highlight the growing importance of data centers in global conflicts, driven by advances in artificial intelligence and cloud computing infrastructure.
content: In a significant development, Iranian Shahed drones targeted Amazon Web Services data centers in the UAE and Bahrain on March 1, 2026, marking the first time commercial data centers came under direct attack during wartime. While one data center in Ba... [851 chars]
